# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://portal.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - User-Agent
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Trace-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Trace-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      policy: local
      minute: 600
      hour: 10000
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

services:
  - name: users-api
    url: http://users:8080
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - User-Agent
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
    routes:
      - name: users-public
        paths:
          - /users/public
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              minute: 120
              hour: 2000
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: users-private
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              minute: 60
              hour: 1000
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: orders-api
    url: http://orders:8080
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          minute: 200
          hour: 3000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: orders-readonly
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              minute: 150
              hour: 2500
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: orders-write
        paths:
          - /orders
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              minute: 40
              hour: 600
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: admin-api
    url: http://admin:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - User-Agent
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          minute: 60
          hour: 500
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: admin-routes
        paths:
          - /admin
        strip_path: false
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false
